title: onobrychis hajastana subsp. takhtajanii
intro: Onobrychis hajastana subsp. takhtajanii, also known as Takhtajan's bird's foot trefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis hajastana subsp. takhtajanii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. It is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
